interface.name: zwlr_output_power_manager_v1

description.summary: manager to create per-output power management

interface.description: This interface is a manager that allows creating per-output power management mode objects.

request.name: get_output_power

description.summary: get a power management mode object for an output

request.description: Create an output power management mode object.

request.name: destroy
request.description: All objects created by the manager will still remain valid.

interface.name: zwlr_output_power_v1

description.summary: adjust power management mode for an output

interface.description: This object offers requests to set the power management mode of an output.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroys the power management mode object.

event.name: mode

description.summary: report a power management mode change

event.description: Report the power management mode change of an output.

event.name: failed
event.description: This event indicates that the output power management mode object is no longer valid.
